special_instructions: Avoid a team with 2 girls if the opponent team has a boy. There are 3 girls in the player list. The name of the girls in the player list are - Neha, Piyusha, Shreya. Do not keep games for Neha, Harpreet, Piyusha and Shreya on court 3.  If possible, avoid same combination of players in a team for more than one game.
